name: Orange Beef and Barley Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds beef for stew, cut into 1 1/2 inch chunks
4 medium carrots, cut into 2 inch pieces
2 medium onions, each cut into 6 wedges
2 cloves garlic, crushed with garlic press
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a 5-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat, cook the beef chunks in 1 tablespoon hot vegetable oil until browned. Remove the meat to a bowl.
3. In the same Dutch oven, add another tablespoon of hot vegetable oil and cook the carrots and onions until browned.
4. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Return the meat to the Dutch oven. Add plum tomatoes with their liquid, beef broth, dry red wine, orange peel, bay leaf, and salt.
6. Heat over high heat, stirring with a spoon to break up the tomatoes until they are cooked through.
7. If desired, transfer the mixture to a deep 5-quart casserole dish. Cover and bake for 45 to 60 minutes longer until the beef and barley are tender.
8. Discard the bay leaf before serving.
9. Makes 6 main-dish servings.
